goal: Multi-host model routing: per-agent host assignment, family-aware reviewer heterogeneity, routing variants, escalation evidence fields, R7 cross-CLI recipe (v4.2.0)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Back-compat: a v4.1-shaped single-host model_routing (string agents values, host as sole host) validates and applies byte-identically; new eval case proves it

Multi-host: agents entries accept {host, class} objects and main_session declares the implementer leg; setup-models with no --host rewrites file hosts and prints codex/pi sections with the PRINT-ONLY banner; --host filter unchanged

Family-aware heterogeneity: cross-host implementer/reviewer same-family errors unless allow_same_family; same concrete model always errors; unknown/placeholder/BYOK ids skip; sonnet vs claude-sonnet-4-5 alias hole caught
Routing variants: assets/routing/{max-intelligence,balanced,max-throughput}.json each splice into the example config check-config-clean

Escalation evidence: models_used/escalations shape-validate; an escalation citing no failing recorded command yields a finding; escalated status without failing commands yields a finding; archived v4.1.0 record fixture still passes
Whole gate suite green with CANONICAL_GATE_CASES and README counts updated

constraints: All new config and record fields are optional/additive; run_metrics untouched (additionalProperties:false would break old validators)
No new subcommands; no report machinery (v3.0 archived the stats surface)
Every feature works in >=2 hosts; never print an applied-checkmark for print hosts
Version sync at 5 sites: SKILL.md frontmatter, example config version, EXPECTED_CONFIG_VERSION, CHANGELOG, packages/npm/package.json
non_goals: Dial or pack-resolution engine (variants are the knob)
Escalation chains config or next-model helper (CQL is routing data, not a runtime)
OpenRouter/Hermes hosts, learned router, per-prompt classifier
R5 process_depth config (this release ships its evidence base only)
Print-host drift detection (impossible; labeled honestly instead)
assumptions: 4.2.0 is free: git tags and npm both at 4.1.0, verified 2026-07-11
No parallel release stream in flight (git log clean at 9a5aa38)
Implementer is claude-fable-5 on claude-code; independent review routes to a different family (GPT-5.6 via codex)
verification_plan: python3 scripts/quality_loop.py setup-models --dry-run against a multi-host fixture
R7 recipe commands each run live once; CLI versions stamped in the doc

validation_contract.goal: Multi-host model routing with family-enforced review independence and escalation evidence, shipped as one additive 4.2.0 release
acceptance_criteria: Back-compat: a v4.1-shaped single-host model_routing (string agents values, host as sole host) validates and applies byte-identically; new eval case proves it

Multi-host: agents entries accept {host, class} objects and main_session declares the implementer leg; setup-models with no --host rewrites file hosts and prints codex/pi sections with the PRINT-ONLY banner; --host filter unchanged

Family-aware heterogeneity: cross-host implementer/reviewer same-family errors unless allow_same_family; same concrete model always errors; unknown/placeholder/BYOK ids skip; sonnet vs claude-sonnet-4-5 alias hole caught
Routing variants: assets/routing/{max-intelligence,balanced,max-throughput}.json each splice into the example config check-config-clean

Escalation evidence: models_used/escalations shape-validate; an escalation citing no failing recorded command yields a finding; escalated status without failing commands yields a finding; archived v4.1.0 record fixture still passes
Whole gate suite green with CANONICAL_GATE_CASES and README counts updated
evidence: python3 scripts/quality_loop.py check-config assets/quality-loop.config.example.json -> config ok
R7 recipe commands verified live (claude -p / codex exec / droid exec -> OK)
regression_risks: breaking shipped v4.1 configs (guarded: back-compat byte-identity eval case)
false-positive heterogeneity on unfilled/placeholder/BYOK configs (guarded: skip-philosophy cases)
eval count lint drift across docs (guarded: case_doc_counts_match_canonical)
install.py/npm asset drift for assets/routing/ (guarded: install copy-list + prepack wholesale copy)
validation_contract.caveat: This change edits the gate scripts themselves, so verify runs against the modified gates; the offline eval suites plus fresh-context different-family review are the compensating evidence.

independent_review.reviewer: gpt-5.6-sol (codex-exec --mode review, fresh context, read-only sandbox)
independent_review.validator: 4-dimension fresh-context swarm (claude-fable-5) with adversarial verification, 24 agents
findings: Round 1 (codex, 6 findings) + swarm (20 raised, 16 confirmed by adversarial verifiers, 2 rejected as intended documented behavior, 2 accepted as out-of-scope cosmetic): all confirmed in-scope findings fixed and pinned by eval - see record.review_findings
Round 2 (codex re-review of fix delta, 1 finding): profile-level same-model comparison was case-sensitive - fixed (casefold), verified by direct probe
Reviewer note honored: codex findings verified against code before acting; two swarm claims refuted by adversarial verification were not acted on

completion_record.goal: Multi-host model routing: per-agent host assignment, family-aware reviewer heterogeneity, routing variants, escalation evidence fields, R7 cross-CLI recipe (v4.2.0)
acceptance_criteria: Back-compat: a v4.1-shaped single-host model_routing (string agents values, host as sole host) validates and applies byte-identically; new eval case proves it

Multi-host: agents entries accept {host, class} objects and main_session declares the implementer leg; setup-models with no --host rewrites file hosts and prints codex/pi sections with the PRINT-ONLY banner; --host filter unchanged

Family-aware heterogeneity: cross-host implementer/reviewer same-family errors unless allow_same_family; same concrete model always errors; unknown/placeholder/BYOK ids skip; sonnet vs claude-sonnet-4-5 alias hole caught
Routing variants: assets/routing/{max-intelligence,balanced,max-throughput}.json each splice into the example config check-config-clean

Escalation evidence: models_used/escalations shape-validate; an escalation citing no failing recorded command yields a finding; escalated status without failing commands yields a finding; archived v4.1.0 record fixture still passes
Whole gate suite green with CANONICAL_GATE_CASES and README counts updated
completion_record.implementation_summary: Multi-host per-role routing (object agents entries + main_session declaration; setup-models applies every host with PRINT-ONLY banners for codex/pi; --host = retarget on v4.1 shape, pure filter on topologies); family-aware cross-host reviewer heterogeneity (family field + WELL_KNOWN_FAMILIES token match, unknown skips, allow_same_family escape hatch, case-insensitive same-model, agents entry is the effective reviewer with a step-class disagreement error); three eval-pinned routing variants + dated menu README (assets/routing/); escalation evidence fields models_used/escalations with a verify-gates rule requiring evidenced recorded failures (resolved RED->GREEN failures no longer block; None/cmd-less entries never excused); R7 cross-CLI recipe live-verified (claude 2.1.207 / codex 0.144.1 / droid 0.170.0); version 4.2.0 at 5 synced sites; gate count 130->144 with dashboard PNG regenerated.
completion_record.right_size_decision: minimal_new_code: extends existing resolve/validate/frontmatter machinery in place; the knob ships as data (variants), zero resolution code; catalog/dial/chains/report deliberately not built (adversarial plan review, recorded in ROADMAP 'Not on the roadmap, on purpose')
evidence: check-config example config -> config ok at 4.2.0
independent review: codex/gpt-5.6-sol (2 rounds) + 24-agent fresh-context swarm with adversarial verification -> approve after fixes
R7 recipe commands each run live once (outputs: OK)
completion_record.risks_rollback: All new config/record fields optional; one deliberate behavior change (same-family v4.1 configs now fail check-config) disclosed in CHANGELOG with remedy. Rollback: revert the branch; downstream configs revert version string to 4.1.0. Residual risks: variant model IDs are dated snapshots (documentation-only by design); escalation evidence remains self-reported at its ceiling (run-evidence is the backstop; gate is a floor, not proof); .pi mirror stale at 3.0.0 (pre-existing).
follow_ups: Regenerate .pi/skills/coding-quality-loop mirror (stale at 3.0.0, predates this change)
setup-models --json error payload shape differs from success payload (cosmetic, nit)
Print-host main-session fallback renders host-local code_specialized when no main_session declared (v4.1 behavior; topologies should declare main_session)
Accumulate models_used/escalations across repos -> R5 replication at n>=3 -> process_depth config
Release actions (merge to main, tag v4.2.0, npm publish) await Zain's go-ahead

callers_checked: install.py copies example config only (routing assets need explicit entries); npm prepack.mjs copies assets/ wholesale
tests: evals/run_routing_evals.py (15 cases, CLI-path against temp dirs)
patterns_to_follow: allow_overthink explicit greppable escape hatch (mirror for allow_same_family)
atomic_write via quality_loop_core; line-based frontmatter editing, no YAML dep
warnings to stderr with exit 1, errors with exit 2 in setup-models; check-config errors exit 1

minimality_decision.reason: Multi-host expression, family comparison, and evidence fields are new semantics no existing rung covers; implementation extends the existing resolve/validate/frontmatter machinery in place rather than adding modules, and the knob ships as data (variants) with zero resolution code.

rejected_lower_rungs.why: single-host assumption is baked into resolve_routing's signature and _reviewer_heterogeneity; no existing path expresses per-agent hosts
touches config semantics, validation, application, and record gates coherently
nothing to delete; the adversarial plan pass already cut catalog/dial/chains/report before implementation

safety_exceptions_checked: back-compat of shipped v4.1 configs (byte-identity eval case)
gate-script integrity: change is to the gates themselves, disclosed in validation_contract; offline suites + independent review compensate

plan: Slice A: quality_loop_routing.py - agents string|object parsing, main_session, model_family()+WELL_KNOWN_FAMILIES, validation for new fields, multi-host setup-models loop with PRINT-ONLY banner, per-host brief rendering
Slice B: quality_loop.py - _reviewer_heterogeneity cross-host + family-aware + allow_same_family; models_used/escalations record gates; EXPECTED_CONFIG_VERSION 4.2.0
Slice C: schemas - config schema (agents string|object, main_session, allow_same_family, family), example config at 4.2.0 with multi-host example, agent-record schema (models_used, escalations)
Slice D: assets/routing/ - three variants + dated README menu; install.py copy list
Slice E: docs - docs/cross-cli-recipe.md (R7, live-verified), agentic-orchestration.md heterogeneity truth + link, SKILL.md lines, ROADMAP checkoffs, CHANGELOG 4.2.0, README counts
Slice F: evals - ~8 routing cases + ~4 record-gate cases, CANONICAL_GATE_CASES 130->~142, npm package.json version

commands_run.cmd: python3 -m py_compile scripts/quality_loop.py scripts/quality_loop_core.py scripts/quality_loop_memory.py scripts/quality_loop_reality.py scripts/quality_loop_routing.py

commands_run.evidence: 44/44 eval cases passed (5 new: models_used shape, escalations shape, escalation-evidence gate, resolved RED->GREEN, v4.1 fixture)
24/24 routing eval cases passed (9 new: back-compat byte-identity, multi-host apply, host filter, cross-host family, alias hole, unknown-skip, topology validation, brief multi-host, variants)

open_risks: Variant model IDs are July-2026 snapshots; staleness is documentation-only by design (no machine consumers)
R7 recipe verified with Claude Code 2.1.207 / codex-cli 0.144.1 / droid 0.170.0; flags may move on CLI upgrades
.pi/skills/coding-quality-loop mirror is stale at 3.0.0 (predates this change; follow-up, out of scope)
review_findings: codex (gpt-5.6-sol): --host retargeted string agents onto the selected host on multi-host configs -> FIXED (filter semantics on topology configs, retarget preserved for v4.1 shape, eval extended)
codex: escalation gate satisfiable by bare fabricated fail rows -> STRENGTHENED (cited fail entries must carry evidence handles; residual self-report ceiling documented)
codex: hostless main_session silently vanished, bypassing heterogeneity -> FIXED (check-config error, eval added)
codex: same-model comparison was case-sensitive -> FIXED (case-insensitive, eval pins uppercase variant)
codex: dashboard PNG/generator stale at 130; README said 144 -> FIXED (generator updated, PNG regenerated via scratch matplotlib venv)
codex: release checklist said git tag v4.1.0 -> FIXED (4.2.0)

swarm (fable, fresh-context x4 + adversarial verify): reviewer-heterogeneity blind spot -- host-less agents reviewer entry applied by setup-models but ignored by the gate -> FIXED (agents entry is the effective reviewer; disagreement error when step class and entry resolve to different concrete models; eval added)
swarm: CHANGELOG migration note undisclosed breaking behavior for same-family v4.1 topologies -> FIXED (explicit disclosure + remedy)
swarm: agents:{} v4.1 config regressed to 'no host selected'/'not configured' -> FIXED (default_host counts as in use; eval extended)
swarm: None==None cmd match excused cmd-less failures -> FIXED (non-empty string cmd required; eval extended)
swarm: main_session with explicit distinct model false-positived same-class branch, and block family wrongly applied to the override -> FIXED (distinct_override + declared-family scoping; eval added)
swarm: agents pinned to host with no host_models block passed validation silently -> FIXED (named error; eval added)
swarm: routing README overclaimed check-config enforcement of two floors -> FIXED (precise attribution: enforced vs by-construction+eval)
swarm: jq cost recipe misattributed multi-model record costs -> FIXED (per-entry attribution)
swarm: config-schema agents oneOf diverged from validator both directions; new record-schema strings lacked minLength -> FIXED
swarm: empty-agents files-host path swallowed thinking warnings (rc 0) -> FIXED (warnings printed, rc 1)

ACCEPTED (out of scope, cosmetic): setup-models --json error payload shape on missing agent dir differs from success payload; print-host main-session fallback renders host-local code_specialized when no main_session is declared (v4.1 behavior, topologies should declare main_session)

REJECTED by adversarial verification (intended, documented): resolved RED->GREEN failure exemption as 'gaming vector'; absence of escalations field escaping audit (pre-v4.2 status quo; shape errors owned by check-record)
next_action: Release: merge v4.2-model-routing, tag v4.2.0, npm publish (human-gated).
